title: Motivational Monday
excerpt: Happy June 1st! I really enjoyed the video challenge I issued to myself of posting a video every weekday in May. Not sure I want to embark on another adventure like that for June, but my head is spinning with…
body: Happy June 1st! I really enjoyed the video challenge I issued to myself of posting a video every weekday in May. Not sure I want to embark on another adventure like that for June, but my head is spinning with a lot of ideas. The trick for me is really honing in on the ones that I want to see all the way through. I'm notorious for starting grand side projects with much anticipation and intention and then not seeing them all the way through. This is ok because they are small and not associated with actual work. The BIG projects and the BIG picture is where sometimes I hesitate. But I am old enough and wise enough to know that if it's something I truly want and desire, I need to just go for it. Do you ever feel like you're taking a big chance and feeling vulnerable? I do quite frequently, I just don't necessarily say it out loud or talk about it. Some chances are worth taking and we have to remember this as we embark on these little and BIG leaps of faith in life. Okay, who's with me on taking big leaps this month?
